{{InfoboxProject
|project=The Portal Wiki
|image=[[File:the-portal-wiki.png]]
|topic=The Portal Community<br>[[The Portal Podcast]]
|leader=[https://twitter.com/LBStone Brandon (Beefsandwich27#0143)]<br>Aardvark (Aardvark#5610)
|startdate=27 January 2020
|customlabel1=
|customdata1=
|customlabel2=
|customdata2=
|customlabel3=
|customdata3=
|customlabel4=
|customdata4=
|link1title=Website
|link1=[[Portal:Main Page|The Portal Wiki]]
|link2title=
|link2=
|link3title=
|link3=
|link4title=Discord
|link4=https://discord.gg/U28Ws5U
}}

The Portal Wiki served as a repository for The Portal Community's collective knowledge and progress on projects. Much of its content was initially based on ideas put forth by [[Eric Weinstein]], but the goal was to create and catalog enough resources that the community could also self-sustain. Contributions were welcomed from anyone, with plenty of tasks and areas for improvement available. Even the smallest contributions were greatly appreciated because they provided the starting point for further development. The community could also be found on their Discord server.

== Archive ==
Many pages from the portal wiki are archived on the [[Lifeism Wiki]]

== Methodology ==
See [[Portal:Getting Started|Getting Started]] for the basics of using and contributing to the wiki, and the [[Portal:Wiki Usage FAQ|Wiki Usage FAQ]] for answers to specific questions.

== Tasks ==
=== Recurring Tasks ===
* Update linking on existing pages to newly created pages.
* Correct and improve writing and grammar on existing pages.
* Update reference sections on existing pages.
=== Major Tasks ===
* Develop and flesh out [[Portal:The Portal|idea pages]].
* Write summaries for podcast episodes and other content.
* Add links in [[:Category:Transcript|podcast and other transcripts]].
* Create reference sections on existing pages.

== Discord server ==

* [https://discord.gg/U28Ws5U Discord server].

[[Category:Projects]]
[[Category:Community]]
[[Category:The Portal Group]]
[[Category:The Portal Wiki]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
